briefdescription.para: Return the headstage the AD channel is assigned to.

parameterdescription.para: AD channel in the range [0,8[ or [0,16[ depending on the hardware

briefdescription.para: Return the headstage the DA channel is assigned to.

parameterdescription.para: DA channel in the range [0,4[ or [0,8[ depending on the hardware

briefdescription.para: Return the AD channel assigned to the headstage.

simplesect.para: AD channel or NaN (for non-associated channels)

briefdescription.para: Return the DA channel assigned to the headstage.

simplesect.para: DA channel or NaN (for non-associated channels)

briefdescription.para: Return the column index into DAQDataWave for the given channel/type combination.

parameterdescription.para: DAQ configuration wave, most users need to call GetDAQConfigWave(device) to get that wave.

briefdescription.para: Return all channel units as free text wave.

parameterdescription.para: DAQ configuration wave, most users need to call GetDAQConfigWave(device) to get that wave.

briefdescription.para: Return the channel unit.

parameterdescription.para: DAQ configuration wave, most users need to call GetDAQConfigWave(device) to get that wave.

briefdescription.para: Return the sweep number of the last acquired sweep.

simplesect.para: a non-negative integer sweep number or NaN if there is no data

briefdescription.para: Return the sweep wave of the last acquired sweep.

simplesect.para: an existing sweep wave or an invalid wave reference if there is no data

briefdescription.para: Return the stimset for the given channel.

parameterdescription.para: one of the type constants from ChannelTypeAndControlConstants

simplesect.para: an existing stimulus set name for a DA channel

briefdescription.para: Return a free wave with all sweep numbers (in ascending order) which belong to the same RA cycle. Uncached version, general users should prefer AFH_GetSweepsFromSameRACycle().

detaileddescription.para: Return an invalid wave reference if not all required labnotebook entries are available

briefdescription.para: Return a free wave with all sweep numbers (in ascending order) which belong to the same RA cycle.

detaileddescription.para: Return an invalid wave reference if not all required labnotebook entries are available

briefdescription.para: Return a free wave with all sweep numbers (in ascending order) which belong to the same stimset cycle.

detaileddescription.para: Return an invalid wave reference if not all required labnotebook entries are available

briefdescription.para: Return a free wave with all sweep numbers (in ascending order) which belong to the same stimset cycle id. Uncached version, general users should prefer AFH_GetSweepsFromSameSCI().

detaileddescription.para: Return an invalid wave reference if not all required labnotebook entries are available

memberdef.argsstring: (string device, wave sweep, variable headstageOrChannelNum, variable channelType, wave config=defaultValue)
memberdef.name: AFH_ExtractOneDimDataFromSweep

briefdescription.para: Return a free 1D wave from the given sweep.

detaileddescription.para: Extract the AD channel data from headstage 1:

para.verbatim: embed:rst:leading-asterisk * .. code-block:: igorpro * * variable sweepNo = 5 * WAVE sweep = GetSweepWave(device, sweepNo) * variable headstage = 1 * WAVE data = AFH_ExtractOneDimDataFromSweep(device, sweep, headstage, XOP_CHANNEL_TYPE_ADC) *

embed:rst:leading-asterisk * .. code-block:: igorpro * * variable sweepNo = 6 * WAVE sweep = GetSweepWave(device, sweepNo) * variable ttlChannel = 1 * WAVE data = AFH_ExtractOneDimDataFromSweep(device, sweep, ttlChannel, XOP_CHANNEL_TYPE_TTL) *

parameterdescription.para: headstage [0, NUM_HEADSTAGES[ or channel number for TTL channels [0, NUM_DA_TTL_CHANNELS]
[optional, defaults to config wave of the sweep returned by GetConfigWave()] config wave

briefdescription.para: Get list of possible analysis functions.

parameterdescription.para: bitmask of different analysis function versions which should be returned, one of AnalysisFunctionVersions

briefdescription.para: Return the list of required/optional analysis function parameters, possibly including the type, as specified by the function $func_GetParams

parameterdescription.para: Analysis function V3 which must be valid and existing

briefdescription.para: Get help string from optional $func_GetHelp
Return a semicolon separated list of user parameters.

memberdef.argsstring: (string name, string params, variable typeCheck=defaultValue, string expectedType=defaultValue)
memberdef.name: AFH_GetAnalysisParamType

briefdescription.para: Return the type of the user parameter.

parameterdescription.para: [optional, defaults to true] Check with an assertion that the readout type is one of ANALYSIS_FUNCTION_PARAMS_TYPES
[optional, defaults to nothing] Expected type, one of ANALYSIS_FUNCTION_PARAMS_TYPES, aborts if the type does not match. Implies typeCheck = true.

simplesect.para: one of AnalysisFunctionParameterTypes or an empty string

briefdescription.para: Return a numerical user parameter.

parameterdescription.para: [optional, defaults to NaN] return this value if the parameter could not be found

memberdef.argsstring: (string name, string params, string defValue=defaultValue, variable percentDecoded=defaultValue)
memberdef.name: AFH_GetAnalysisParamTextual

briefdescription.para: Return a textual user parameter.

parameterdescription.para: [optional, defaults to an empty string] return this value if the parameter could not be found
[optional, defaults to true] if the return value should be percent decoded or not.

briefdescription.para: Return a numerical wave user parameter.

parameterdescription.para: [optional, defaults to an invalid wave ref] return this value if the parameter could not be found

simplesect.para: wave reference to free numeric wave, or invalid wave ref in case the parameter could not be found.

memberdef.argsstring: (string name, string params, WaveText defValue=defaultValue, variable percentDecoded=defaultValue)
memberdef.name: AFH_GetAnalysisParamTextWave

briefdescription.para: Return a textual wave user parameter.

parameterdescription.para: [optional, defaults to an invalid wave ref] return this value if the parameter could not be found
[optional, defaults to true] if the return value should be percent decoded or not.

simplesect.para: wave reference to free text wave, or invalid wave ref in case the parameter could not be found.

briefdescription.para: Check if the given name is a valid user parameter name.
Check if the given type is a valid user parameter type.
Return an user parameter's value as string.

parameterdescription.para: [optional, defaults to nothing] Expected type, one of ANALYSIS_FUNCTION_PARAMS_TYPES, aborts if the type does not match.

briefdescription.para: Delete the given user parameter name.
Check the analysis parameters according to the optionally present check function.

parameterdescription.para: Name of an analysis V3 function

simplesect.para: multiline error messages, an empty string on success

memberdef.argsstring: (string setName, string name, variable var=defaultValue, string str=defaultValue, wave wv=defaultValue)
memberdef.name: AFH_AddAnalysisParameter

briefdescription.para: Add an analysis function parameter to the given stimset.

detaileddescription.para: This function adds the parameter to the WPT wave and checks that it is valid.
Exactly one of var/str/wv must be given.

parameterdescription.para: [optional] wave parameter can be numeric or text

briefdescription.para: Return the headstage from the given active AD count.

parameterdescription.para: channel status as returned by GetLastSetting()
running number of active ADC's, starting at zero

simplesect.para: headstage in the range [0, NUM_HEADSTAGES], or NaN if nothing could be found

briefdescription.para: AFH Helper functions for analysis function writers

detaileddescription.para: Additionally the following functions might be useful

entry.para: Free wave with all active AD channels as entries
Free wave with all active DA channels as entries
Wave reference to the labnotebook (numerical version)
Wave reference to the labnotebook (textual version)
Last documented value for headstages of a specific setting in the labnotebook for a given sweep number.
Last documented numerical value for headstages of a specific setting in the labnotebook and the sweep number it was set last.
Last documented textual value for headstages of a specific setting in the labnotebook and the sweep number it was set last.
Add a user entry to the numerical/textual labnotebook
